mapper.update: UPDATE original_channels SET deleted = 1 WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, provider_id, name, url, tvg_id, tvg_name, tvg_logo, group_title, tvg_country, tvg_language, created_at, updated_at FROM original_channels WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY name ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, provider_id, name, url, tvg_id, tvg_name, tvg_logo, group_title, tvg_country, tvg_language, created_at, updated_at FROM original_channels WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, provider_id, name, url, tvg_id, tvg_name, tvg_logo, group_title, tvg_country, tvg_language, created_at, updated_at FROM original_channels WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY name ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO original_channels (provider_id, name, url, tvg_id, tvg_name, tvg_logo, group_title, tvg_country, tvg_language, created_at, updated_at, task_id, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.providerId}, #{item.name}, #{item.url}, #{item.tvGuideId}, #{item.tvGuideName}, #{item.tvGuideLogo}, #{item.groupTitle}, #{item.tvGuideCountry}, #{item.tvGuideLanguage}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, #{taskId}, 0)
